0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"prose dark:prose-invert max-w-none","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"mb-8","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-brand-600 dark:text-brand-400 mb-2","children":"Architecture"}],["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-zinc-900 dark:text-zinc-100","children":"AAAK Compression"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-4 text-lg text-zinc-600 dark:text-zinc-400 leading-relaxed","children":"Adaptive Associative Abstraction Kernel (AAAK) is Mnemosyne's context compression algorithm. It reduces token count while preserving semantic meaning."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"group","children":["The Problem",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Agent context windows are limited (4K–128K tokens). Raw memory dumps consume precious space. AAAK compresses related memories into concise summaries."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"group","children":["How AAAK Works",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cluster"}],": Group related memories by vector similarity"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Abstract"}],": Generate a summary that captures the cluster's essence"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Associate"}],": Link the summary to original entries for drill-down"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Kernel"}],": Store as a dense \"memory kernel\" for efficient retrieval"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"group","children":["Compression |\n|--------------|-----------|------------|-------|\n| Conversation | 2,000 | 200 | 10:1 |\n| Documentation | 5,000 | 400 | 12:1 |\n| Code snippets | 1,500 | 300 | 5:1 |\n| Mixed content | 3,000 | 350 | 8:1 |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"group","children":["Using AAAK",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"group","children":["Configuration",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| compression |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"aaak_target_ratio"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"8.0"}]," | Target compression ratio |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"aaak_min_cluster"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"3"}]," | Minimum memories to form a cluster |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"aaak_max_tokens"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"500"}]," | Maximum tokens for Critical facts should be stored in Semantic Memory (which is not compressed) or marked with high importance to avoid consolidation."}]}]]}]]}]}]],"$L4"]}],["$L5","$L6","$L7","$L8","$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le"],"$Lf"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"13CUtGaRSuTJGgL3e4CZM"}
